channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: There's a screw loose at the Australian Open: Sinner's match against Rune delayed by a net problem
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The screw holding the net in place at the Australian Open's main stadium got jarred loose during defending champion Jannik Sinner's fourth-round match against Holger Rune on Monday, delaying play for about 20 minutes early in the fourth set. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Broadcaster apologizes after Novak Djokovic refuses post-match TV interview at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The host broadcaster has apologized after Novak Djokovic declined to do a customary post-match on court interview at the Australian Open Sunday to protest comments made on air by someone who works for the TV network.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Josh Allen scores 2 TDs, Bills force 3 turnovers to beat Ravens 27-25 and reach AFC title game
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen heard the “MVP! MVP!” chants directed at him from the stands, but Buffalo's quarterback deflected the credit following the Bills' hard-fought victory in the divisional playoff round. This season's Bills were thought to be thin on both sides of the ball.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scoot Henderson scores 25 points, Trail Blazers beat Bulls 113-102 to end 5-game skid
item.description: Scoot Henderson had 25 points and the Portland Trail Blazers snapped five-game losing streak with a 113-102 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen scores 2 TDs, Bills force 3 turnovers to beat Ravens 27-25 and reach AFC title game
item.description: The Bills closed their season a perfect 10-0 at home, including a 30-21 win over the previously unbeaten Chiefs in Week 11.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Powell and the Clippers beat James and the Lakers 116-102 in Lakers' first visit to Intuit Dome
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Norman Powell scored 22 points, James Harden added 21 points and 12 assists and the Los Angeles Clippers defeated LeBron James and the Los Angeles Lakers 116-102 on Sunday night in the Lakers' first visit to the new Intuit Dome.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Elina Svitolina rallies to reach the Australian Open quarterfinals for the third time
item.description: Elina Svitolina has rallied from two breaks down in the first set and taken 11 of the next 12 games in a 6-4, 6-1 victory over Veronika Kudermetova to reach the Australian Open quarterfinals for the third time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Austria's Sepp Straka cruises to a 2-shot victory over Justin Thomas at The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — Sepp Straka had never entered a final round with a lead on the PGA Tour until Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Barkley runs for 78- and 62-yard TDs in the snow and Eagles top Rams 28-22 to head to NFC title game
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley blew through a hole and ran untouched in the wintry mix, the Eagles' 2,000-yard rusher smacking his helmet with his hand on his final snowy steps of a 78-yard touchdown run.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former MLB catcher, AL manager of the year for the White Sox dies at 83
item.description: Jeff Torborg, a former MLB catcher and manager of the Chicago White Sox, died this morning in Westfield, New Jersey, after a career that included a World Series championship and a Manager of the Year award.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Auburn's Bruce Pearl slams Hamas terrorists after 3 Israeli hostages are released
item.description: Auburn Tigers men's basketball head coach Bruce Pearl slams Hamas terrorists as a video showed their reaction to freeing three Israeli hostages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Goldin scores 31 points in No. 20 Michigan's 80-76 overtime victory over Northwestern
item.description: Valdislav Goldin scored 31 points, Nimari Burnett added 13 and No. 20 Michigan rallied to beat Northwestern 80-76 in overtime Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Bob Tripi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Man United boss Ruben Amorim thinks this might be the worst team in the club's history
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Ruben Amorim delivered a withering assessment of his Manchester United team after its latest loss, admitting it might be the “worst” side in the club's storied history.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tyrrell Hatton outduels Daniel Hillier to win Dubai Desert Classic by a stroke
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Englishman Tyrrell Hatton held off Daniel Hillier of New Zealand to win the Dubai Desert Classic by a stroke on Sunday, equaling Jon Rahm's record of five Rolex Series victories.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Islam Makhachev submits late-replacement Renato Moicano in 1st round at UFC 311
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Lightweight champion Islam Makhachev submitted 10th-ranked Renato Moicano at 4:05 of the first round Saturday night at UFC 311 for his 15th straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texans' Kris Boyd tosses helmet, shoves special teams coach after opening kick in playoff game against Chiefs
item.description: Television cameras captured Texans defensive back Kris Boyd using two hands to shove Houston's special teams coordinator shortly after the kickoff opened divisional round play.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Breanna Stewart scores first basket in Unrivaled history in debut of 3-on-3 women's league
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unrivaled shined brightly on its opening night. The 3-on-3 women’s basketball league co-founded by WNBA stars Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier debuted Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chiefs fans banking on three-peat during Wild Card Weekend
item.description: The NFL playoffs kicked off on Saturday, but the Kansas City Chiefs have to wait another week for their playoff campaign to start. It’s leaving fans with mixed feelings.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Sloan, NewsNation

item.title: Return of Sammy Sosa a big draw for fans at Cubs Convention 2025
item.description: The convention promises a weekend of panel discussions, autograph opportunities and the appearance of one of the best all-time hitters, fan favorite Sammy Sosa.
item.dc:creator: Erik Runge, WGN 9

item.title: CMU baseball, softball picked to top RMAC in 2025
item.description: In the RMAC preseason coaches poll, both CMU Baseball and CMU softball were selected to top the conference.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: South Side native Katie Schumacher-Cawley coaches PSU to national v-ball title while undergoing cancer treatment
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky./CHICAGO (AP, WGN) — Katie Schumacher-Cawley, a native of the Mount Greenwood neighborhood on Chicago's South Side, is an NCAA national champion — for a second time. But there's so much inspiration to her story beyond just winning on the court.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Keyonte George returns, but Jazz lose to Hornets, 117-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down three starters, the Utah Jazz young players are getting a chance to shine these days. After playing very well for three quarters, the Jazz ran out of gas in the fourth and lost to the Charlotte Hornets Wednesday night, 117-112.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Padres Peavy, Gonzalez headline 77th Salute to the Champions
item.description: The Padres duo, along with WNBA star Charde Houston, now have a permanent place inside the Western Metal Supply Company building at Petco Park as Breitbard Hall of Famers.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: The Athletic's Dianna Russini provides a look inside the Bears search for their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have requested interviews with 19 candidates for their next head coach, including Mike McCarthy, Thomas Brown, Ron Rivera, Ben Johnson, Todd Monken, and Steve Sarkisian, while the ambiguity around Ryan Poles' contract situation may make it more difficult for the Bears to hire their
item.dc:creator: Jarrett Payton, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs sign former Brewers starting pitcher to one-year deal
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have signed former Milwaukee Brewers starting pitcher Colin Rea to a new contract for the 2025 MLB season, while the Cubs have designated RHP Michael Arias for assignment to make room for Rea on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
